name: Ubiquiti PoE++ Adapter
title: Ubiquiti PoE++ Adapter
title_extended: Ubiquiti PoE++ Adapter - 60W PoE++, 48V DC 1.25A, 802.3bt, RJ45 data input
short_description: PoE adapter for UniFi PoE++ devices, 48V DC 1.25A, 802.3bt, RJ45 data input
description: PoE adapter for UniFi PoE++ devices, 48V DC 1.25A, 802.3bt, RJ45 data input

detailed_description.heading: High-Power PoE++ Adapter for Network Devices
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti U-POE++ Adapter is an advanced Power over Ethernet (PoE++) adapter crafted to meet the high-power demands of the latest network devices. Utilizing the IEEE 802.3bt standard, this adapter can deliver up to 60 watts of power over Ethernet cabling, providing a robust solution for powering high-performance access points, surveillance cameras, and other power-intensive network equipment. Adapter, identified by the manufacture part number U-POE++

detailed_description.heading: Key Features
detailed_description.text: Features: Delivers up to 60W of PoE++ Compatible with UA Hub, G4 PTZ, and other PoE++ devices Surge, peak pulse, and overcurrent protection Contains RJ45 data input, AC cable with earth ground, and PoE++ output LED indicator for status monitoring

detailed_description.heading: Industrial-Grade Construction and Safety
detailed_description.text: Constructed with industrial-grade materials, the U-POE++ is built to withstand a variety of environmental conditions, making it suitable for both indoor and challenging outdoor applications. Its durability ensures long-term reliability and performance, maintaining network integrity. Moreover, the U-POE++ includes multiple safety features such as overcurrent protection, voltage regulation, and short-circuit protection. These integrated safety measures protect the adapter and connected devices from potential electrical hazards, enhancing overall network safety.

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed Data and Network Performance
detailed_description.text: Supporting data speeds of up to 1 Gbps, the U-POE++ adapter ensures that network performance is not hindered by its power delivery. This feature is crucial in high-demand environments where maintaining maximum data throughput is necessary. This model is ideal for use in extensive network deployments, the U-POE++ is particularly valuable in commercial and industrial settings where high-powered devices are prevalent. It enables the deployment of complex network configurations where traditional power delivery methods are inadequate.

detailed_description.heading: Plug-and-Play Installation
detailed_description.text: The plug-and-play functionality of the U-POE++ allows for effortless installation. It requires no software configuration and is compatible with standard Ethernet cables, which simplifies the setup process and integration into existing network infrastructures. It also equipped with intuitive LED indicators, the adapter provides immediate visual feedback regarding power and data status. These indicators are crucial for effective system monitoring and quick troubleshooting, helping to maintain operational efficiency.
